Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.separator.conformity

Class ConformityRuleSet.TR1965RuleSet

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.separator.conformity.ConformityRuleSet
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.separator.conformity.ConformityRuleSet.TR1965RuleSet
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ConformityRuleSet
private static class ConformityRuleSet.TR1965RuleSet extends ConformityRuleSet
Equinor TR1965 gas scrubber conformity rules.

The rule set covers gas-load K-factor limits by scrubber internals type, documented outlet liquid entrainment, documented liquid design margin, and geometric distance checks when the project has configured the relevant elevations on GasScrubberMechanicalDesign.

  • Constructor Details

    • TR1965RuleSet

      TR1965RuleSet()
      Constructs a TR1965RuleSet.

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      public ConformityReport evaluate(GasScrubberMechanicalDesign design)
      Evaluates all applicable conformity checks against the given mechanical design.

      The checks run depend on what internals are installed. The method reads operating conditions from the scrubber's current fluid state (after the most recent run).

      Specified by:
      evaluate in class ConformityRuleSet
      Parameters:
      design - the scrubber mechanical design to check
      Returns:
      a conformity report with all check results

    • getConstraintNames

      public List<String> getConstraintNames(GasScrubberMechanicalDesign design)
      Returns the names of CapacityConstraints that this standard defines.

      These can be used to enable the corresponding constraints on the Separator via separator.enableConstraints(...).

      Specified by:
      getConstraintNames in class ConformityRuleSet
      Parameters:
      design - the mechanical design (to check which internals are installed)
      Returns:
      list of constraint names to enable

    • selectKFactorLimit

      private double selectKFactorLimit(GasScrubberMechanicalDesign design)
      Selects the base TR1965 K-factor limit for the configured internals.
      Parameters:
      design - scrubber mechanical design
      Returns:
      base K-factor limit in m/s before surface-tension derating

    • addDistanceChecks

      private void addDistanceChecks(GasScrubberMechanicalDesign design, ConformityReport report)
      Adds TR1965 vessel-internal distance checks to a report.
      Parameters:
      design - scrubber mechanical design
      report - report receiving the conformity results

    • calculateKFactor

      private double calculateKFactor(double diameterM, double gasFlowM3s, double gasDensity, double liquidDensity)
      Calculates the gas-load K-factor.
      Parameters:
      diameterM - vessel internal diameter in m
      gasFlowM3s - gas volumetric flow rate in m3/s
      gasDensity - gas density in kg/m3
      liquidDensity - liquid density in kg/m3
      Returns:
      Souders-Brown K-factor in m/s, or NaN when the inputs are invalid

    • getGasDensity

      private double getGasDensity(SystemInterface fluid)
      Gets the gas density from a fluid.
      Parameters:
      fluid - thermodynamic fluid
      Returns:
      gas density in kg/m3, or NaN when unavailable

    • getLiquidDensity

      private double getLiquidDensity(SystemInterface fluid)
      Gets the liquid density used in the K-factor denominator.
      Parameters:
      fluid - thermodynamic fluid
      Returns:
      liquid density in kg/m3, or 1000 kg/m3 for dry gas screening

    • getGasFlowRateM3s

      private double getGasFlowRateM3s(SystemInterface fluid)
      Gets gas volumetric flow from a fluid.
      Parameters:
      fluid - thermodynamic fluid
      Returns:
      gas volumetric flow rate in m3/s, or zero when unavailable

    • getSurfaceTensionMNPerM

      private double getSurfaceTensionMNPerM(SystemInterface fluid)
      Gets gas-liquid surface tension when a liquid phase exists.
      Parameters:
      fluid - thermodynamic fluid
      Returns:
      surface tension in mN/m, or NaN when unavailable

    • getSurfaceTensionDeratingFactor

      private double getSurfaceTensionDeratingFactor(double surfaceTensionMNPerM)
      Calculates the screening derating factor for low surface tension fluids.
      Parameters:
      surfaceTensionMNPerM - gas-liquid surface tension in mN/m
      Returns:
      K-factor multiplier in the range 0.0 to 1.0
